name: Belcando Dog Dry Food Oldie & Light - 12.5KG
description: Developed in Germany using carefully selected ingredients, BELCANDO® Oldie & Light provides complete daily nutrition for older dogs, less active dogs, and dogs with sensitive digestion. Why Choose BELCANDO® Oldie & Light Dog Food? Gentle Formula for Senior Dogs This carefully balanced recipe is ideal for older dogs with sensitive stomachs or digestive issues. The gentle formulation supports easy digestion while delivering all essential nutrients required for healthy aging. Supports Healthy Bones & Joints Senior dogs require additional support for mobility and joint health. BELCANDO® Oldie & Light contains vital nutrients and carefully selected ingredients that help maintain strong bones and healthy joints, especially in dogs with heavier body structures. Rich in High-Quality Animal Protein With 70% animal protein content, this premium formula helps maintain lean muscle mass and supports overall body condition in aging dogs. Omega-3 Fatty Acids for Skin & Coat Health Salmon oil and linseed provide essential omega-3 fatty acids that help support: Healthy skin Shiny coat Joint health Overall vitality Healthy Digestion & Reduced Stool Odour Natural ingredients including beet pulp, herbs, and Yucca schidigera help support digestive health and reduce unpleasant intestinal and stool odours. Natural Immune Support Beta-glucans from natural yeast help strengthen the immune system and support overall wellness in senior dogs. Key Benefits of BELCANDO® Oldie & Light Premium senior dog food for adult and aging dogs Gentle formula for sensitive digestion Supports healthy bones and joints Rich in poultry and fish protein Contains omega-3 fatty acids for healthy skin and coat Helps reduce stool odour with Yucca schidigera Supports immunity with natural yeast beta-glucans Highly digestible recipe Made in Germany with premium-quality ingredients Main Ingredients BELCANDO Oldie & Light contains carefully selected ingredients including: Poultry protein Rice Fish meal from sea fish Poultry fat Salmon oil Linseed Beet pulp Brewers’ yeast Carob Potato starch Herbs including chamomile, fennel, nettle, yarrow, and gentian root Yucca schidigera Nutritional Additives This premium senior dog formula contains essential vitamins and minerals including: Vitamin A Vitamin D3 Vitamin E Taurine Zinc Iron Copper Selenium Iodine Natural tocopherol extracts (Vitamin E) are included as natural antioxidants to maintain freshness and nutritional quality. Ideal for Senior & Less Active Dogs BELCANDO Oldie & Light Adult Dog Food is suitable for: Senior dogs Less active adult dogs Dogs with sensitive digestion Small and medium-sized breeds Support your dog’s health, mobility, and happiness with BELCANDO® Oldie & Light premium senior nutrition designed for healthy aging and everyday wellbeing.
